name: Almond Joy Cake 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9 x 13 inch baking pan, bake the chocolate cake according to the package directions.
2. In a saucepan, combine 1 cup of evaporated milk, 1 cup of sugar, marshmallows, and coconut. Heat until the marshmallows are melted. Pour over the hot cake.
3. In another saucepan, melt the margarine. Add the remaining 1 1/2 cups of sugar and 1/2 cup of evaporated milk. Bring to a boil. Add the chocolate chips and stir until melted. Then add the almonds. Pour this mixture over the cake.
